name: @soltrade/asset-transfer-intents
description: Asset Transfer Intent state machine + simulated ownership flip (Gate D / D1). In-memory, deterministic, simulated only. asset_transfer_status PENDING->SUBMITTED->CONFIRMED/FAILED/CANCELLED; position_owner_wallet_id flips only on CONFIRMED; admin-gated create/cancel; idempotency; append-only audit. No live transfer; no transfer-boundary; no token transfer; no tx build/serialize/sign/send; no KeyManager; no key material; no RPC; no DB; no rotation/sweep; no REAL-LIVE; no execution authority.
